stages.role: GPT structured extraction from table crop
stages.input: Mammafiore 8-column table: Pr. Unitário 15,192 | Desc. 28,50 | IVA 6,00 | Valor 10,86
stages.failureMechanism: line_total_net reads IVA column (6,00) instead of Valor (10,86). gross_unit_price reads net/discounted amount (10.86) instead of Pr. Unitário (15.192).
evidence: v29 stability: 4/5 runs total=6 with ivaColumnBleed=true
Visible invoice IVA cell = 6,00 exactly matches extracted total

stages.failureMechanism: Binder faithfully maps line_total_net to total; does not correct IVA bleed.
evidence: discount-line-audit: binder/reconcile do not introduce discount total divergence

stages.role: Reconcile line items to invoice net subtotal
stages.failureMechanism: Reconcile preserves Pass C total; no Valor correction.

historicalPassCRaw.note: Earlier probe showed qty=2 pack-notation confusion (Rub Di Capra, total 10.28); current v27+ failure is different — qty=1 correct, IVA total bleed.

goodRunExample.note: Even on success, unit_price still net (10.86) not list (15.192); total correct so financial error €0
